creator: daeron@shadowmere.student.utwente.nl
text:
There exists a "circular" dependency between the gettext and gettext-devel
	ports. The gettext-devel port requires bison to build, which in turn
	requires libintl to build. Which will result in installing BOTH gettext AND
	gettext-devel ports whith the gettext-devel port basically overwriting a
	lot of files from the gettext port.

Fix: 

Don't know how to fix this.
How-To-Repeat: 	Try to build gettext-devel port without libintl currently available.
